final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for an original, non-infringing fragrance brand named "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an East-Asian artisanal brand identity aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a structured brand spec sheet layout showing primary colors, secondary colors, and typography specimens in clear labeled sections
Subject: must include the brand identity system for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" — primary palette swatches, secondary palette swatches, and typeface specimens
Scene/backdrop: needs a refined editorial brand-board atmosphere — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs warm autumnal tones drawn from 桂花 (osmanthus), 柿子 (persimmon), 枫叶 (maple), 乌龙茶, 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀 — exact hex values and swatch ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a surface quality evoking traditional Chinese "染" (dyeing) craft — exact grain and texture weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the wordmark; must include section labels for 主色 / 辅色 / 字体规范; must include the three fragrance line names: "桂花乌龙" / "琥珀枫叶" / "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must preserve the brand philosophy of East-Asian philosophy meeting seasonal natural transition; primary + secondary color groups must be visually distinct; typography section must show at least one typeface specimen
Avoid: Western-only aesthetic; cold or desaturated color directions; generic mood-board collage without clear spec structure
